generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance RealTimeObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected path for operator situational awareness"
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports for developer troubleshooting and system performance analysis"
]

instance ACCSpeedComputation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computing ACC speed in digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling ACC system via remote control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling ACC system via remote control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting ACC speed via remote control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggering emergency braking via remote control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display, saving, and report generation of vehicle state data",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeObjectTrackVisualization, VehicleStateReport
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system from vehicle to DT for speed computation",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCSpeedComputation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC via UI for enabling/disabling, speed setting, and emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Object tracking and visualization service",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeObjectTrackVisualization
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudRawTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance IntelD435iVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudRawTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance IntelD435iVisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera",
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelD435iVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state and object track timeseries data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance ClusteredObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustered object tracks from LiDAR data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudRawTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilteredObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Kalman-filtered object tracks",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudRawTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCControlAlgorithmModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control algorithm compliant with ISO 15622 (Performance Class I)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity implemented as ROS2 package on vehicle Jetson hardware"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity cloud-hosted as ROS2 package"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity client devices as ROS2 package"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity Data Translation as ROS2 package"
]

instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for raw point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudRawTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelD435iVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle-specific sensor for speed measurements",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle-specific sensor for steering angle measurements",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed into motor voltage commands via Actuation FE"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for steering control via Actuation FE"
]

instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN processing for LiDAR point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control algorithm execution",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data storage and retrieval using SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for prototyping",
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANProcessingEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering and tracking",
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANProcessingEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration",
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANProcessingEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management",
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built by retrofitting a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle with autonomy components, including NVIDIA Jetson NX and Jetson Orin Nano microcomputers, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller, structured into lower-level chassis (steering/speed control), upper-level chassis (mounting platform), and autonomy elements.",
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity, HokuyoLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuationComponent, SteeringServoActuationComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustments, emergency braking) from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity, where Actuation FE converts these into motor voltage commands and steering servo signals."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "End-to-end latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity (per 3GPP TS 22.185 V2V communication standards), with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all distributed components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC control, data processing), User Entity (3D visualization and control panel), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), interconnected via ROS2 network for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily used during vehicle operation (as-operated phase) for ACC monitoring and control, with applications in design phase for cyber-physical experimentation and compliance validation per automotive DT literature."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation strictly adheres to ISO 15622 Section 6.1–6.2 for Performance Class I (no road curvature capabilities), with fidelity considerations limited to hardware constraints of the 1/10-scale vehicle; no explicit verification/validation methods beyond standards compliance described."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication within the vehicle, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication between vehicle and cloud-hosted components, with data serialization and protocol alignment handled by the Data Translation FE."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage hosted in cloud infrastructure; User Entity deployed on client devices for remote access."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Part 2 reference architecture for DT structure, ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy implementation, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Document references 'safety-critical nature of the system' and compliance with vehicular safety standards but provides no specific technical or ethical security measures for remote operations or cybersecurity."
]
